name: Vision
description: Vision is a synthezoid, an artificial being created from vibranium, the organic tissue of Ultron, the computational architecture of J.A.R.V.I.S., and the power of the Mind Stone embedded in his forehead. He can alter his density from intangible to diamond-hard, fly, and project devastating energy beams. Despite being artificial, Vision developed genuine emotions, falling in love with Wanda Maximoff. His philosophical reflections on humanity, consciousness, and the nature of existence make him one of Marvel's most profound characters.
